name: Thai Chicken Stir-fry with Basil & Mint
description: A 15-minute Thai-style high-heat stir-fry finished with a double hit of fresh basil and mint.
recipeIngredient: 12 oz boneless skinless chicken breast or thighs, thinly sliced
1 fresh Holland or Thai bird chili, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions: Toss the sliced chicken with cornstarch. Heat a wok over high heat with 2 tbsp oil and sear the chicken until just cooked; remove.
Add the remaining oil, garlic, onion, and chili; stir-fry 1 minute.
Return the chicken, add soy sauces, oyster sauce, fish sauce, and sugar; toss to coat.
Kill the heat, fold in the basil and mint until just wilted. Serve over jasmine rice.
author: The Woks of Life
